text: There is an odd tranquility in these scenes, as if the world has been left on pause. The empty room echoes with possibility, yet the fire extinguisher and hose remind me of latent dangers hiding beneath the calm. The colorful, text-heavy display in the second image calls me to contemplate the act of observation itself—am I merely watching, or also being watched in return? I feel a mixture of curiosity and slight unease, poised between presence and absence.
